caption:
🗺️🔗 Link to the London map with the best spots to visit and the latest promo codes🎁-saved in bio 

The new BYOMA Wonderlab Pop-Up has just opened in London! 🎀🤍✨

Enjoy a fun, immersive festive experience featuring: 🎀 Creating bespoke BYOMA keychains 🍫 Relaxing in BYOMA Breakroom with a hot chocolate 📸 Capturing holiday portraits in the Memory Lab
🎁 All guests will take home an exclusive BYOMA goody bag, including a £5.00 Boots voucher to cover the cost of the pop-up

🎟️ Tickets cost £5 and are redeemable on BYOMA products at Boots stores before 14 December

📆 Friday 5 and Saturday 6 December

📍 The Truman Brewery, Number 1, Ely’s Yard, 15 Hanbury St, E1 6QR

@byoma @bootsuk 

📸 @kseniia.journey 

#london #new #byoma
